visual: Pulls both hands back toward the chest palms-up in a withdrawing motion, then pushes both palms forward in a bow stance.
motion_description: The person begins in a right bow stance with both arms extended forward. They shift their weight back onto the left leg, pulling both hands back toward the lower torso with palms facing upwards as the left arm sweeps under the right. With a steady, continuous motion, the weight shifts forward again onto the right leg. Concurrently, both palms rotate to face outward and press forward and slightly upward to shoulder height.
